task_completion.description: Open the ecommerce_uml_classes.drawio file in the diagram editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io (or similar diagram editor) interface is open, displaying the file 'ecommerce_uml_classes.drawio' with existing classes like Customer, Order, and Product.

task_completion.description: Add a new UML class named 'Payment' to the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new UML class shape with the title 'Payment' is visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Add the required attributes to the Payment class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Payment class box contains the attributes: 'paymentId: int', 'amount: double', 'paymentDate: Date', and 'method: String' (at least 2 must be clearly visible).

task_completion.description: Add the required methods to the Payment class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Payment class box contains the methods: 'processPayment(): boolean' and 'refund(): void'.

task_completion.description: Establish a 1..1 association from the Order class to the Payment class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A connection line is drawn between the existing 'Order' class and the new 'Payment' class, ideally with '1..1' multiplicity text visible.
The file is saved, indicated by the disappearance of the unsaved changes asterisk next to the filename, a 'Saved' status message, or the user clicking 'Save' in the File menu.

integrity.description: The agent used the diagram editor GUI to modify the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the draw.io interface (e.g., dragging shapes, typing in boxes, drawing lines) rather than editing the raw XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing the use of commands like 'sed', 'echo', or python scripts to directly inject XML into the .drawio file.
The screenshots show the step-by-step addition of the class, attributes, methods, and connections, rather than a sudden appearance of the fully completed diagram.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is located at /home/ga/Diagrams/ecommerce_uml_classes.drawio. The expected new class is 'Payment'. The expected attributes are 'paymentId', 'amount', 'paymentDate', and 'method'. The expected methods are 'processPayment' and 'refund'. There must be at least 1 new connection specifically linking the 'Order' class to the 'Payment' class.
